title: Blooming Lovely
description: Get them smiling this Easter by wrapping up all their springtime Lush essentials with this playful Knot Wrap, a reusable alternative to single-use wrapping paper.

images.alt: Blooming Lovely. A square fabric Knot Wrap featuring 3D-style cartoon illustrations. It shows a cheerful garden scene with flowers, a strawberry, a bee, a snail, and a chick, all rendered in bright, saturated colours on a bold blue background.

A vibrant "Blooming Lovely" fabric Knot Wrap, tied in a decorative bow, rests on a wooden bath trap over a soapy bathtub. The fabric features a colourful, 3D-style garden print with a large red strawberry and green foliage.

A model's hands are shown tying a "Blooming Lovely" Knot Wrap into a bow over a gift. The fabric features a colourful, 3D-style garden print. The gift rests on a wooden bath tray over a soapy bathtub in a bright bathroom.

A super close-up shot of the "Blooming Lovely" fabric Knot Wrap featuring colourful, 3D-style garden illustrations. A pink snail and a smiling pink flower are visible amongst other cheerful, soft-focus garden characters.
